action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 12 ran a local search on 15 training maps. The SimpleGreedyPlanner (global Dijkstra, utility/(dist+1.0), visited penalty 0.1) scored 0.9112 with 100% success and ~350m mean distance, far above the current best eval score of 0.6118. The DirectionalPlanner variants peaked at only 0.6142 locally. Analysis: The SimpleGreedy planner is much stronger than previously evaluated on the full eval set. The current predict.py in workspace is truncated and likely caused the lower eval in iteration 11. I need a complete, bug-free predict.py using SimpleGreedyPlanner, a matching smoke test, and then submit evaluation immediately to measure full-dataset performance. Decision: Overwrite predict.py and smoke_test.py with clean, complete code, run a quick smoke test, then submit eval.
